extension.news: v. 1.0.17 "Stronghold" - 2026-07-17 Introducing Vault: Build Watch Later and custom collections from any supported site or Global Search, with batch selection, search and portable backup/restore. Download Center, polished: Follow active jobs through native background progress with speed and ETA, then manage queue and history from Kodi. Global Search now filters, sorts and removes duplicates from cached results without repeating the original search. Added 25 new sites, including Stripchat live rooms and a broad mix of tube, archive and resolver-backed sources. Playback now supports global quality preferences, seek-safe Range proxying and centralized mirror preflight/fallback. Fixed AllPornStream search, MissAV Vault actions, PornoBae pagination, protected artwork, PornRabbit archive playback and CherryGasp navigation. Vault and Download Center are localized in English, German, Spanish and French.
extension.description:
Internet [COLOR red]XXX Porn Video[COLOR white] Streams.
[COLOR red][B]WARNING:[/B][COLOR red]Only for adults[/COLOR]
[COLOR white]AdultHideout does not host third-party videos on its own servers and is not affiliated with the websites supported by the addon. Content, streams and metadata are provided by third-party websites.[/COLOR]
[COLOR white]Github: https://github.com/Vashiel/repository.adulthideout [/COLOR]
extension.disclaimer: AdultHideout does not host third-party videos on its own servers and is not affiliated with the websites supported by the addon. Content, streams and metadata are provided by third-party websites.
